Break Wali League

HOW TO PLAY

The Game
1
Register Once

Enter your name and phone number. Verify with OTP. You're in the league permanently — your stats and rank are saved forever.

2
One Over Per 12 Hours

Each player gets 1 over (6 balls) every 12 hours — either batting or bowling. Once you play your over, the next one unlocks after 12 hours.

3
Choose Batting or Bowling

Batting: Swipe right with power to play shots — more power = bigger runs. Bowling: Time your release on the speed meter to take wickets.

4
Every Ball Scores

Batting always gives you runs (1, 2, 3, 4 or 6). Bowling gives you wicket points (Bowled = 12pts, Catch = 8pts, LBW = 4pts) or deductions (-1, -4, -6).

Points & Boost
5
Double Points During Matches

Whenever an IPL 2026 match is live (3.5 hours from start time), all points are automatically doubled. The match banner at the top will show when boost is active.

6
Points Table

Batting: 6=6pts, 4=4pts, 3=3pts, 2=2pts, 1=1pt. Bowling: Bowled=12pts, Catch=8pts, LBW=4pts, Wide=-1pt, No Ball=-4pts, Six=-6pts.

Leaderboard
7
Live Rankings

The leaderboard updates after every ball. Your rank is based on total points accumulated across all your overs throughout the season.

8
Season End

The league runs through the IPL 2026 season. Top players will be recognised at the end. Keep playing every 12 hours to climb the rankings!
